mapper.select:
select COALESCE(sum(dh.change_amount),0) from jsh_depot_head dh where 1=1 and dh.pay_type != '预付款'
and dh.account_id = #{accountId}::bigint
and dh.oper_time >= #{beginTime}::timestamp
and dh.oper_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp
and (dh.status = '1' or dh.status = '2' or dh.status = '3')
and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1'

select COALESCE(sum(ah.change_amount),0) from jsh_account_head ah where 1=1
and ah.account_id = #{accountId}::bigint
and ah.bill_time >= #{beginTime}::timestamp
and ah.bill_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp
and ah.status = '1'
and ah."type" != '收预付款' and COALESCE(ah.delete_flag,'0') !='1'

select COALESCE(sum(ai.each_amount),0) from jsh_account_head ah left join jsh_account_item ai on ah.id = ai.header_id and COALESCE(ai.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where 1=1
and ai.account_id = #{accountId}::bigint
and ah.bill_time >= #{beginTime}::timestamp
and ah.bill_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp
and ah.status = '1'
and ah."type" not in ('收款','付款') and COALESCE(ah.delete_flag,'0') !='1'

select dh.account_id_list accountIdList, dh.account_money_list accountMoneyList from jsh_depot_head dh where 1=1
and #{accountId}::text = any(string_to_array(replace(COALESCE(dh.account_id_list,''),' ',''), ','))
and dh.oper_time >= #{beginTime}::timestamp
and dh.oper_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp
and (dh.status = '1' or dh.status = '2' or dh.status = '3')
and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1'

select a.id, (select COALESCE(sum(dh.change_amount),0) from jsh_depot_head dh where 1=1 and dh.pay_type != '预付款' and dh.account_id = a.id
and dh.oper_time >= #{beginTime}::timestamp
and dh.oper_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp
and (dh.status = '1' or dh.status = '2' or dh.status = '3')
and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1') accountSum, (select COALESCE(sum(ah.change_amount),0) from jsh_account_head ah where 1=1 and ah.account_id = a.id
and ah.bill_time >= #{beginTime}::timestamp
and ah.bill_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp
and ah.status = '1'
and ah."type" != '收预付款' and COALESCE(ah.delete_flag,'0') !='1') accountSumByHead, (select COALESCE(sum(ai.each_amount),0) from jsh_account_head ah left join jsh_account_item ai on ah.id = ai.header_id and COALESCE(ai.delete_flag,'0') !='1' where 1=1 and ai.account_id = a.id
and ah.bill_time >= #{beginTime}::timestamp
and ah.bill_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp
and ah.status = '1'
and ah."type" not in ('收款','付款') and COALESCE(ah.delete_flag,'0') !='1') accountSumByDetail from jsh_account a where 1=1
and a."name" like #{bindName}
and a.serial_no like #{bindSerialNo}
and COALESCE(a.delete_flag,'0') !='1' order by a.sort asc, a.id desc
LIMIT #{rows} OFFSET #{offset}

select dh.account_id_list accountIdList, dh.account_money_list accountMoneyList from jsh_depot_head dh where 1=1 and dh.account_id_list !=''
and dh.oper_time >= #{beginTime}::timestamp
and dh.oper_time <= #{endTime}::timestamp
and (dh.status = '1' or dh.status = '2' or dh.status = '3')
and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag,'0') !='1'

select concat('bill-', dh.id, '-0') as "rowKey", 1 as sourceOrder, dh.id as sourceId, 0 as detailId, dh.number, concat(dh.sub_type, dh."type") as "newType", 'bill' as "fromType", s.supplier, dh.change_amount, TO_CHAR(dh.oper_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as "oTime", '' as "AList", '' as "AMList", dh.remark from jsh_depot_head dh left join jsh_supplier s on dh.organ_id = s.id and COALESCE(s.delete_flag, '0') != '1' where dh.account_id = #{accountId}::bigint and COALESCE(dh.pay_type, '') != '预付款' and COALESCE(dh.change_amount, 0) != 0 and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag, '0') != '1'
and dh.status in ('1', '2', '3')
UNION ALL
select concat('financial-', ah.id, '-0'), 2, ah.id, 0, ah.bill_no, ah."type", 'financial', s.supplier, ah.change_amount, TO_CHAR(ah.bill_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '', '', ah.remark from jsh_account_head ah left join jsh_supplier s on ah.organ_id = s.id and COALESCE(s.delete_flag, '0') != '1' where ah.account_id = #{accountId}::bigint and ah."type" != '收预付款' and COALESCE(ah.change_amount, 0) != 0 and COALESCE(ah.delete_flag, '0') != '1'
and ah.status = '1'
UNION ALL
select concat('financial-', ah.id, '-', ai.id), 3, ah.id, ai.id, ah.bill_no, ah."type", 'financial', case when ah."type" = '转账' then '' else s.supplier end, ai.each_amount, TO_CHAR(ah.bill_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '', '', ah.remark from jsh_account_head ah join jsh_account_item ai on ai.header_id = ah.id and COALESCE(ai.delete_flag, '0') != '1' left join jsh_supplier s on ah.organ_id = s.id and COALESCE(s.delete_flag, '0') != '1' where ai.account_id = #{accountId}::bigint and ah."type" not in ('收款', '付款') and COALESCE(ai.each_amount, 0) != 0 and COALESCE(ah.delete_flag, '0') != '1'
and ah.status = '1'
UNION ALL
select concat('bill-many-', dh.id), 4, dh.id, 0, dh.number, concat(dh.sub_type, dh."type"), 'bill', s.supplier, dh.change_amount, TO_CHAR(dh.oper_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), dh.account_id_list, dh.account_money_list, dh.remark from jsh_depot_head dh left join jsh_supplier s on dh.organ_id = s.id and COALESCE(s.delete_flag, '0') != '1' where #{accountId}::text = any(string_to_array(replace(COALESCE(dh.account_id_list, ''), ' ', ''), ',')) and COALESCE(dh.delete_flag, '0') != '1'
and dh.status in ('1', '2', '3')
order by "oTime" desc, sourceOrder desc, sourceId desc, detailId desc
